subcodes.first_line: The Hidden Unseen beareth witness that He hath been made manifest in truth, and He is this Treasured Name that calleth betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الغیب المکنون بانه ظهر بالحق و هو هذا الاسم المخزون الذی ینادی بین الارض
